title: 100pcs Medium Brown Paper Bags, Party Bags, Gift bag DIY and Sweet bags with Strong Twisted Handles (20.5x12x25cm)
availability_text: Only 11 left in stock (more on the way).
features: STRONG & VERSATILE BAGS: These Brown paper party bags have a flat bottom and sturdy rope handles attached well, capable of carrying a good amount of weight.
MATERIAL: kraft paper; COLOR: brown, SIZE: Medium (205x120x250mm), QTY: 100pcs
DIY KRAFT PAPER BAGS: These kraft bags are ideal for arts and crafts. They can be customized with paint, prints, and decorations. You can even add your business logo and use it as retail bags.

SUITABLE FOR FUNCTIONS & CELEBRATIONS: Small gift bags are ideal for all birthday parties, wedding ceremonies, baby shower, christmas gifts, kraft projects, wedding decorations, party bags for kids party, gift bags for presents, etc.

DURABLE & ECO-FRIENDLY BAGS: Paper bags with handles are made with high-quality and eco-friendly biodegradable materials. These Brown paper bags are sturdy and can be recycled, reused, or composted, making them difficult to tear apart.
